name: Forsaken-Killers
description:
"Hey, psst, THERE ARE KILLERS IN THIS GAME HELLO??? Forsaken killers all in one package. Because some of these bots just don't make sense or i personally don't like them

Update: Made a few changes now C00LKID Is from TRUD (aka trud persona cuz I'm scared of what people may do..) But will still keep some of his forsaken assets (such as minor childishness)

The upper text has been retconned. Every character in TRUD has been confirmed to be 18 years old or older. C00lk1dd is presumably around 19-21 years old.
